title.en: Wi-Fi-Free TV Bands: the TVWS-FSK, OFDM and NB-OFDM PHYs
title.zh: 无 Wi-Fi 的电视频段：TVWS-FSK、OFDM 与 NB-OFDM PHY

blocks.en: Television white space (TVWS) is the slice of UHF/VHF spectrum that broadcasters leave unused in any given location. Because these frequencies sit far below the crowded 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi bands, radio waves there travel much farther and bend around buildings and trees. IEEE 802.15.4-2024 defines three physical layers (PHYs) that let low-rate devices borrow this empty TV spectrum: TVWS-FSK (Clause 25), TVWS-OFDM (Clause 26), and TVWS narrowband OFDM, or TVWS-NB-OFDM (Clause 27). This lesson is a coverage map of all three: how each one frames a packet (its PPDU), how it modulates and codes bits, and what RF rules it must obey.
blocks.zh: 电视空白频段（TVWS）是指广播电视在某一地点未使用的那部分 UHF/VHF 频谱。由于这些频率远低于拥挤的 2.4 GHz 和 5 GHz Wi-Fi 频段，电波在此能传播得更远，并能绕过建筑物和树木。IEEE 802.15.4-2024 定义了三种物理层（PHY），让低速率设备能借用这些空闲的电视频谱：TVWS-FSK（第 25 章）、TVWS-OFDM（第 26 章）以及 TVWS 窄带 OFDM（TVWS-NB-OFDM，第 27 章）。本课是这三者的覆盖地图：每一种如何组帧（其 PPDU）、如何调制与编码比特，以及必须遵守哪些射频规则。

blocks.en: A PPDU (PHY protocol data unit) is the complete over-the-air packet the radio actually transmits. Every PHY here wraps the data the same way: a known training preamble so the receiver can lock on, a short PHY header (PHR) describing what follows, then the payload (the PSDU) carrying your actual bits.
blocks.zh: PPDU（PHY 协议数据单元）是无线电实际发射的完整空口数据包。这里的每种 PHY 都用相同方式封装数据：一段已知的训练前导，让接收机锁定信号；一个简短的 PHY 头（PHR），描述后续内容；然后是承载实际数据比特的净荷（PSDU）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 640 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="8" y="24" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">TVWS-FSK PPDU</text><rect x="8" y="34" width="150" height="40"/><text x="83" y="59" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">SHR (Preamble+SFD)</text><rect x="158" y="34" width="90" height="40"/><text x="203" y="59" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PHR</text><rect x="248" y="34" width="384" height="40"/><text x="440" y="59" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PHY Payload (PSDU)</text><text x="8" y="112" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">TVWS-OFDM / NB-OFDM PPDU</text><rect x="8" y="122" width="80" height="40"/><text x="48" y="147" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">STF</text><rect x="88" y="122" width="80" height="40"/><text x="128" y="147" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">LTF</text><rect x="168" y="122" width="90" height="40"/><text x="213" y="147" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PHR</text><rect x="258" y="122" width="374" height="40"/><text x="445" y="147" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PHY Payload (PSDU + Tail + Pad)</text><text x="8" y="196" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">FSK uses a preamble+SFD to sync; the OFDM PHYs use STF (timing) then LTF (channel estimate).</text></svg>

caption.en: The three TVWS PHYs share a PHR + payload backbone but differ in how they synchronize: FSK uses a bit-pattern preamble and SFD, while both OFDM PHYs lead with a Short Training Field (STF) and Long Training Field (LTF).
caption.zh: 三种 TVWS PHY 共享 PHR + 净荷主干，但同步方式不同：FSK 使用比特图样前导和 SFD，而两种 OFDM PHY 都以短训练字段（STF）和长训练字段（LTF）开头。

blocks.en: Start with TVWS-FSK (Clause 25), the simplest of the three. Frequency-shift keying (FSK) sends bits by nudging the carrier frequency up or down. The PPDU (25.1.1) opens with a synchronization header (SHR, 25.1.2) made of a Preamble field of repeated 01010101 bytes (25.1.2.2) and a start-of-frame delimiter (SFD) that is 16 or 24 bits long and signals whether the rest is error-coded (25.1.2.3). The PHR (25.1.3) carries a ranging flag, a parity check, an FCS-length selector, a data-whitening flag, and the frame length; the PHY Payload field (25.1.4) then carries the encoded PSDU. FSK supports five operating modes (25.2.1) at 50 to 400 kb/s, in 2-level or 4-level form, each generated by a reference modulator (25.2.2).
blocks.zh: 先看最简单的 TVWS-FSK（第 25 章）。频移键控（FSK）通过把载波频率上移或下移来发送比特。其 PPDU（25.1.1）以同步头（SHR，25.1.2）开头，由重复 01010101 字节的前导字段（25.1.2.2）和长 16 或 24 比特、用于指示后续是否经过纠错编码的帧起始定界符（SFD，25.1.2.3）组成。PHR（25.1.3）携带测距标志、奇偶校验、FCS 长度选择位、数据白化标志和帧长；PHY 净荷字段（25.1.4）随后承载编码后的 PSDU。FSK 支持五种工作模式（25.2.1），速率 50 到 400 kb/s，分为 2 电平或 4 电平形式，每种都由参考调制器（25.2.2）生成。

blocks.en: Three optional processing steps shape the FSK bitstream. Forward error correction (FEC) and interleaving (25.2.3) add redundancy so the receiver can repair bit errors; FSK offers three FEC schemes borrowed from other PHYs. Data whitening (25.2.4) XORs the payload with a pseudo-random sequence so long runs of identical bits do not skew the radio. Spreading (25.2.5) repeats each bit to trade rate for robustness. The radio then maps bits to frequency tones: one bit per tone for 2-level FSK, two bits across four deviation levels for 4-level FSK (25.2.6), and the SHR is always sent 2-level. Modulation quality (25.2.7) follows the SUN FSK rule, and a lookup table gives phySymbolsPerOctet for each level/FEC combination (25.2.8).
blocks.zh: 三个可选处理步骤塑造 FSK 比特流。前向纠错（FEC）与交织（25.2.3）增加冗余，使接收机能修复误码；FSK 提供三种借自其他 PHY 的 FEC 方案。数据白化（25.2.4）将净荷与伪随机序列做异或，避免长串相同比特扰乱无线电。扩频（25.2.5）重复每个比特，以速率换取稳健性。随后无线电将比特映射到频率音：2 电平 FSK 每音一比特，4 电平 FSK 每两比特映射到四个频偏电平（25.2.6），而 SHR 始终以 2 电平发送。调制质量（25.2.7）遵循 SUN FSK 规则，并由查找表给出每种电平/FEC 组合的 phySymbolsPerOctet（25.2.8）。

blocks.en: TVWS-OFDM (Clause 26) trades FSK's simplicity for higher throughput by splitting the signal across many orthogonal subcarriers. Its general rule (26.1) sets a default two-repetition STF for acknowledgment timing. The PPDU (26.2.1) begins with that STF (26.2.2) for coarse timing and an LTF (26.2.3) for channel estimation, then a one-symbol PHR (26.2.4) carrying ranging, rate, frame length, scrambler seed, and a 16-bit header check sequence (HCS), followed by the PSDU (26.2.5). The system table (26.3) defines a 1064.5 kHz nominal bandwidth with 108 active tones across six MCS levels, MCS0-2 mandatory (BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM at 390-1562 kb/s) and MCS3-5 optional at 4x overclock.
blocks.zh: TVWS-OFDM（第 26 章）以 FSK 的简单性换取更高吞吐，方法是把信号分散到许多正交子载波上。其总则（26.1）规定 STF 默认重复两次以用于确认帧定时。PPDU（26.2.1）以该 STF（26.2.2）开头用于粗定时，以 LTF（26.2.3）用于信道估计，随后是占一个符号的 PHR（26.2.4），携带测距、速率、帧长、扰码种子和 16 比特头校验序列（HCS），后接 PSDU（26.2.5）。系统参数表（26.3）定义了 1064.5 kHz 的标称带宽、108 个有效音，跨六个 MCS 级别：MCS0-2 为强制（BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM，390-1562 kb/s），MCS3-5 为可选的 4 倍超频模式。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A[PSDU bits] --> B[Scrambler PN9]
  B --> C[Convolutional FEC R=1/2]
  C --> D[Interleaver]
  D --> E[Bit-to-symbol map BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM]
  E --> F[Add pilot/DC/guard tones]
  F --> G[IFFT + Cyclic Prefix]
  G --> H[Pulse shape + RF]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A[PSDU 比特] --> B[扰码 PN9]
  B --> C[卷积 FEC R=1/2]
  C --> D[交织器]
  D --> E[比特到符号映射 BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM]
  E --> F[加入导频/DC/保护音]
  F --> G[IFFT + 循环前缀]
  G --> H[脉冲整形 + 射频]

blocks.en: Walk the TVWS-OFDM transmit chain (26.4). A reference modulator (26.4.1) chains the blocks; bit-to-symbol mapping (26.4.2) places bits onto BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM points scaled by a normalization factor KMOD so every mode has equal average power. A rate-1/2 convolutional FEC (26.4.3) protects the data, a two-permutation interleaver (26.4.4) spreads errors apart, and 8 pilot tones plus a DC null sit among the 100 data tones (26.4.5). A cyclic prefix (CP, 26.4.6) one-quarter of the symbol guards against echoes; a six-zero PPDU Tail (26.4.7) flushes the encoder; a Pad field (26.4.8) rounds the data to a whole number of symbols; and a PN9 scrambler (26.4.9), seeded from the PHR, randomizes the bits before transmission.
blocks.zh: 走一遍 TVWS-OFDM 发射链（26.4）。参考调制器（26.4.1）把各模块串起来；比特到符号映射（26.4.2）将比特放到 BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM 星座点上，并用归一化因子 KMOD 缩放，使每种模式平均功率相同。速率 1/2 的卷积 FEC（26.4.3）保护数据，两步置换交织器（26.4.4）把错误分散开，8 个导频音加 1 个 DC 空音位于 100 个数据音之间（26.4.5）。占符号四分之一的循环前缀（CP，26.4.6）抵御回波；六个零的 PPDU 尾（26.4.7）清空编码器；填充字段（26.4.8）把数据补齐到整数个符号；由 PHR 播种的 PN9 扰码器（26.4.9）在发射前随机化比特。

blocks.en: TVWS-NB-OFDM (Clause 27) is the narrowband cousin: a ~381 kHz signal so thin that many can fit inside one TV channel, useful where only fragments of white space remain. Its PPDU (27.1.1) again leads with STF (27.1.2) and LTF (27.1.3), then a PHR (27.1.4) that adds a Channel Aggregation field and uses an 8-bit HCS, followed by the PHY Payload (27.1.5). System parameters (27.2) give 384 subcarriers (352 data, 32 pilot) at ~0.992 kHz spacing, with selectable cyclic-prefix lengths. Nine MCS levels (27.3.1) span BPSK through 64-QAM at 156-1638 kb/s, generated by a reference modulator (27.3.2).
blocks.zh: TVWS-NB-OFDM（第 27 章）是窄带表亲：约 381 kHz 的信号如此之窄，可在一个电视频道内并排放入多个，适用于仅剩零碎空白频段的场景。其 PPDU（27.1.1）同样以 STF（27.1.2）和 LTF（27.1.3）开头，随后是 PHR（27.1.4），它增加了信道聚合字段并使用 8 比特 HCS，后接 PHY 净荷（27.1.5）。系统参数（27.2）给出 384 个子载波（352 数据、32 导频），间隔约 0.992 kHz，循环前缀长度可选。九个 MCS 级别（27.3.1）从 BPSK 到 64-QAM，覆盖 156-1638 kb/s，由参考调制器（27.3.2）生成。

blocks.en: NB-OFDM's coding chain is the richest of the three. A PN9 scrambler (27.3.3) whitens the bits; then a concatenated code applies a Reed-Solomon (204,188) outer encoder (27.3.4) for burst-error cleanup and a recursive systematic convolutional inner encoder at rate 1/2, 3/4, or 7/8 with puncturing (27.3.5). Pad bits (27.3.6) align the stream to whole symbols. A spreader (27.3.7) protects the PHR by 4x repetition, bit interleaving (27.3.8) reorders within a symbol, subcarrier mapping (27.3.9) Gray-codes onto BPSK/QPSK/16-/64-QAM with KMOD scaling, and a fixed random frequency interleaver (27.3.10) scatters tones across the band. Pilot tones (27.3.11) are inserted every 12 subcarriers and every 4 symbols, a selectable cyclic prefix (27.3.12) and time-domain windowing for pulse shaping (27.3.13) finish the symbol, and phySymbolsPerOctet (27.3.14) is derived from the RS code and the MCS rate.
blocks.zh: NB-OFDM 的编码链是三者中最丰富的。PN9 扰码器（27.3.3）白化比特；随后级联码先用 Reed-Solomon (204,188) 外编码器（27.3.4）清理突发错误，再用速率 1/2、3/4 或 7/8 的递归系统卷积内编码器配合打孔（27.3.5）。填充比特（27.3.6）把流对齐到整数个符号。扩频器（27.3.7）以 4 倍重复保护 PHR，比特交织（27.3.8）在符号内重排，子载波映射（27.3.9）以格雷码映射到 BPSK/QPSK/16-/64-QAM 并用 KMOD 缩放，固定的随机频率交织器（27.3.10）把音散布到整个频段。导频音（27.3.11）每 12 个子载波、每 4 个符号插入一次，可选循环前缀（27.3.12）和用于脉冲整形的时域加窗（27.3.13）完成符号，phySymbolsPerOctet（27.3.14）则由 RS 码和 MCS 速率推导得出。

blocks.en: Two features distinguish NB-OFDM operationally. Channel aggregation (27.4) lets several narrow subchannels be bonded into a 6 MHz or 8 MHz pipe when spectrum is available, with up to 11 or 16 subchannels respectively. And like every PHY, it carries an RF rulebook (27.5): the operating bands (27.5.1), per-MCS receiver sensitivity from -97 to -78 dBm (27.5.2), TX-to-RX and RX-to-TX turnaround times (27.5.3, 27.5.4), an error-vector-magnitude (EVM) test bounding constellation error per MCS (27.5.5), and a +/-20 ppm transmit center-frequency and symbol-clock tolerance from a common oscillator (27.5.6).
blocks.zh: 两项特性在运行层面区分了 NB-OFDM。信道聚合（27.4）允许在频谱可用时把若干窄子信道捆绑成 6 MHz 或 8 MHz 的管道，分别最多 11 或 16 个子信道。与每种 PHY 一样，它也带有一套射频规则（27.5）：工作频段（27.5.1）、各 MCS 的接收灵敏度从 -97 到 -78 dBm（27.5.2）、TX 到 RX 与 RX 到 TX 的转换时间（27.5.3、27.5.4）、限制各 MCS 星座误差的误差矢量幅度（EVM）测试（27.5.5），以及来自同一振荡器的 ±20 ppm 发射中心频率和符号时钟容差（27.5.6）。

summary.en: Coverage map: every RF-requirement and remaining subclause across all three TVWS PHYs
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：三种 TVWS PHY 的全部射频要求及其余子条款

blocks.en: TVWS-FSK RF requirements (25.3): operating frequency range from the band table (25.3.1); a +/-20 ppm clock-frequency and timing accuracy (25.3.2); channel switch time per the LECIM FSK rule (25.3.3); receiver sensitivity per SUN FSK (25.3.4); TX-to-RX and RX-to-TX turnaround times (25.3.5, 25.3.6); a receiver maximum input level of at least -20 dBm (25.3.7); receiver energy detection, ED (25.3.8); and a link quality indicator, LQI (25.3.9). TVWS-OFDM RF requirements (26.5): operating frequency range (26.5.1); root-raised-cosine pulse shaping with 0.5 roll-off (26.5.2); a transmit power spectral density (PSD) mask conforming to local regulation (26.5.3); per-MCS receiver sensitivity from -97 to about -88 dBm (26.5.4); TX-to-RX and RX-to-TX turnaround (26.5.5, 26.5.6); a 20-packet, 16-symbol EVM test (26.5.7); and a +/-20 ppm transmit center-frequency and symbol-clock tolerance from a shared oscillator (26.5.8). All three PHYs draw their operating bands from the same Table 10-47.
blocks.zh: TVWS-FSK 射频要求（25.3）：来自频段表的工作频率范围（25.3.1）；±20 ppm 的时钟频率与定时精度（25.3.2）；按 LECIM FSK 规则的信道切换时间（25.3.3）；按 SUN FSK 的接收灵敏度（25.3.4）；TX 到 RX 与 RX 到 TX 的转换时间（25.3.5、25.3.6）；至少 -20 dBm 的接收机最大输入电平（25.3.7）；接收机能量检测 ED（25.3.8）；以及链路质量指示 LQI（25.3.9）。TVWS-OFDM 射频要求（26.5）：工作频率范围（26.5.1）；滚降 0.5 的根升余弦脉冲整形（26.5.2）；符合当地法规的发射功率谱密度（PSD）模板（26.5.3）；各 MCS 接收灵敏度从 -97 到约 -88 dBm（26.5.4）；TX 到 RX 与 RX 到 TX 转换（26.5.5、26.5.6）；20 包、16 符号的 EVM 测试（26.5.7）；以及来自共用振荡器的 ±20 ppm 发射中心频率和符号时钟容差（26.5.8）。三种 PHY 的工作频段都取自同一张表 10-47。

cites.note: Clause 25 TVWS-FSK PHY: PPDU format, modulation/coding, RF requirements
Clause 26 TVWS-OFDM PHY: STF/LTF/PHR, system params, modulation/coding, RF requirements
Clause 27 TVWS-NB-OFDM PHY: PPDU, system params, coding chain, channel aggregation, RF requirements
